heading: Regulations; authority of Comptroller General to verify assertions
label: 3555 Regulations; authority of Comptroller General to verify assertions

children.label: a
children.text: The Comptroller General shall prescribe such procedures as may be necessary to the expeditious decision of protests under this subchapter, including procedures for accelerated resolution of protests under the express option authorized by . Such procedures shall provide that the protest process may not be delayed by the failure of a party to make a filing within the time provided for the filing.section 3554(a)(2) of this title
the day of the act, event, or default from which the designated period of time begins to run not be included; and

children.label: A
children.text: such last day is a Saturday, a Sunday, or a legal holiday; or

children.label: B
children.text: in the case of a filing of a paper at the Government Accountability Office or a Federal agency, such last day is a day on which weather or other conditions cause the closing of the Government Accountability Office or Federal agency, in which event the next day that is not a Saturday, Sunday, or legal holiday shall be included.

children.heading: Electronic Filing and Document Dissemination System.—
children.label: c Electronic Filing and Document Dissemination System.—
A
children.text: a person filing a protest under this subchapter may file the protest through electronic means; and

children.label: B
children.text: all documents and information required with respect to the protest may be disseminated and made available to the parties to the protest through electronic means.

children.heading: .—In general
children.label: A .—In general
children.text: The Comptroller General may require each person who files a protest under this subchapter to pay a fee to support the establishment and operation of the electronic system under this subsection, without regard to whether or not the person uses the system with respect to the protest.

children.heading: .—Amount
children.label: B .—Amount
children.text: The Comptroller General shall establish (and from time to time shall update) a schedule setting forth the amount of the fee to be paid under subparagraph (A).

children.heading: .—Establishment of account
children.label: A .—Establishment of account
children.text: The Comptroller General shall maintain a separate account among the accounts of the Government Accountability Office for the electronic system under this subsection, and shall deposit all amounts received as fees under paragraph (2) into the account.

children.heading: .—Use of amounts
children.label: B .—Use of amounts
children.text: Amounts in the account maintained under this paragraph shall be available to the Comptroller General, without fiscal year limitation, solely to establish and operate the electronic system under this subsection.

children.label: d
children.text: The Comptroller General may use any authority available under chapter 7 of this title and this chapter to verify assertions made by parties in protests under this subchapter.
